child_sections.title: Financial Position
child_sections.summary: Financial Position Net-Interest Income: The net-interest income of the Bank rose to Birr 685.5 million in 2006-07, from Birr 497 million in 2005-06 (37.9% rise), mainly on the back of a higher growth in interest income over interest expense. The

child_sections.title: Operating Expenses:
child_sections.summary: Operating Expenses: The operating expenses of the Bank stood at Birr 729.2 million at year-end, up by 111.3%, over the preceding year’s total of Birr 345.1 million. This growth was attributed mainly to the growth in general expenses by 224.1%.
